title: AVIR | Luxury Smart Home Solutions
metaDescription: Luxury smart home solutions, designed for the discerning.
bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking LUXURY SMART HOME SOLUTIONSDESIGNED FOR THE DISCERNING↓ Scroll here for more infoAutomationAutomation is the backbone of any smart system.More on AutomationSound & VisionAll of your media, in every room, at the highest quality.More on mediashadingTame harsh sunlight into a soft pleasing glow.More on ShadingLightingTransform the light in your space to suit your mood.More on LightingHome CinemaOur home theaters rival even the best commercial cinemas.More on Home CinemaAutomationAutomation is the backbone of any smart system.More on AutomationSound & VisionAll of your media, in every room, at the highest quality.More on mediashadingTame harsh sunlight into a soft pleasing glow.More on ShadingLightingTransform the light in your space to suit your mood.More on LightingHome CinemaOur home theaters rival even the best commercial cinemas.More on Home CinemaProcessOur ProcessDesign SpecialistsWe all need someone to help us dream. An AVIR design specialist can help you do just that, showing you the best new products available and helping create a vision for your home.ProposalIncluded in the process from the very beginning, our proposal department works with our design specialists to offer you an inspirational balance of aesthetics and technical foresight, using the finest electronic products in the world.EngineeringOur engineering team is the logistical backbone of AVIR, providing drawings, specs, and calculations to the rest of the AVIR team while also working closely with your contractor, designer and architect.InstallationOur installation team is thorough and precise. They work off of detailed drawings from our engineering department to install all of our fine products and calibrate them to function at their highest level. Project ManAgementFacilitating communication between AVIR and the other industry professionals involved in your project, our project management team ensures that the vision of our design team is executed in the field and held to AVIR’s high standard of quality.ProgrammingOur team of world-class programmers ensure that our systems are elegantly intuitive, so that your experience with your new system is natural and effortless. ServiceOur service team is what truly makes your experience with AVIR special. We offer the highest level of customer service and support seven days a week. We are always available to you with white glove service for repairs and upgrades, to get the most out of our installations for many years to come. BuildingProfessional PartnersAVIR works with homeowners and professional partners alike.Interior DesignersArchitectsBuildersEngage the expertsThank you! Your submission has been received!Oops!
